hooks.command: MEMORY=$(cat contracts/claude-session-memory.json | jq -c '{schemaVersion,contractId,lastUpdated,lastOptimized,currentState,versioningRules,deployFlow,gitPatterns,ciPatterns,commonPatterns,optimizations,contextSeparation:{goldenRules:.contextSeparation.goldenRules},multiCompanyModel:{description:.multiCompanyModel.description,goldenRules:.multiCompanyModel.goldenRules,companies:{getronics:{workspaceId:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.workspaceId,status:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.status,tokenSecret:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.tokenSecret,repos:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.repos,repoDetails:(.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.repoDetails|map_values({role,currentVersion,ci}))},cit:{workspaceId:.multiCompanyModel.companies.cit.workspaceId,status:.multiCompanyModel.companies.cit.status}}},workspaceSeparationAudit:.multiCompanyModel.workspaceSeparationAudit}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); PENDING=$(cat contracts/pending-tasks.json 2>/dev/null || echo '[]'); SYNC=$(cat state/community-resources-sync.json 2>/dev/null | jq -c '{lastSync:.lastSync,sources:.sources|map({name:.name,lastCommit:.lastCommit})}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"'"$MEMORY"'","pendingTasks":"'"$PENDING"'","communitySync":"'"$SYNC"'"}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Loading memory + pending tasks + community sync status...

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"REMEMBER: Before compacting, ensure contracts/claude-session-memory.json has been updated with any new decisions, patterns, or lessons learned during this session."}'
echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION END REMINDER: Update contracts/claude-session-memory.json with new learnings, commit, and push before closing."}'

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); DANGEROUS=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -cE '(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM|format [A-Z]:|mkfs|dd if=|chmod 777|curl.*\| *sh|wget.*\| *sh)' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$DANGEROUS" -gt 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Potentially destructive command detected. Review required."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi
